title: Leontopodium linearifolium
taxonomy: Leontopodium linearifolium is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Compositae, commonly known as the Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Leontopodium, which consists of several alpine plants native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The exact classification of Leontopodium linearifolium is further categorized as a member of the tribe Inuleae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and phylogenetic relationships with other plants in the Asteraceae family. As a member of the Asteraceae family, Leontopodium linearifolium is closely related to other plants such as daisies and sunflowers.
